title.v: khai báo các bút toán phân bổ định kỳ

header.v: Giá trị đã phân bổ nt
Giá trị phân bổ kỳ nt

footer.v: 1 - Còn sử dụng, 0 - Không còn sử dụng

command.text: declare @unitName nvarchar(1023), @currencyCode varchar(33), @currencyName nvarchar(1023), @crAcct char(1), @drAcct char(1) select @crAcct = rtrim(c.tk_cn), @drAcct = rtrim(b.tk_cn) from dmpbky a with(nolock) left join dmtk b with(nolock) on a.tk_no = b.tk left join dmtk c with(nolock) on a.tk_co = c.tk where a.ma_bt = @ma_bt select @crAcct = isnull(@crAcct, '0'), @drAcct = isnull(@drAcct, '0') select @unitName = case when @@language = 'v' then ten_dvcs else ten_dvcs2 end from dmdvcs where ma_dvcs = @@unit select @currencyCode = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ma_nt0' select @currencyName = case when @@language = 'v' then ten_nt else ten_nt2 end from dmnt where ma_nt = rtrim(@currencyCode) select 'var f = this;f._crAcct=' + @crAcct + ';f._drAcct=' + @drAcct + ';f._currencyCode=''' + rtrim(@currencyCode) + ''';f._currencyName=''' + replace(replace(isnull(rtrim(@currencyName), ''), '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + ''';f._unitCode=''' + @@unit + ''';f._unitName=''' + replace(replace(isnull(@unitName, ''), '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + ''';f._controlFocus = f.getItem(''ma_bt'');' as message return

declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$updateConflict nvarchar(512), @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã bút toán %s đã có hoặc lồng nhau trong khai báo các bút toán phân bổ định kỳ.' else N'The entry code %s is invalid or already exists.' end select @$updateConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã bút toán %s đã phát sinh, không thể sửa được.' else N'Cannot edit the entry code %s. It has already been used.' end select @$deleteConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã bút toán %s đã phát sinh, không thể xóa được.' else N'Cannot delete the entry code %s. It has already been used.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Bản ghi hiện thời đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'This item has been modified or deleted by another user.' end

if exists(select * from @@table where ((ma_bt like rtrim(@ma_bt) + '%') or rtrim(@ma_bt) like rtrim(ma_bt) + '%')) begin select 'ma_bt' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_bt)) as message return end select @stt = isnull(max(stt), 0) + 1 from @@table select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

if not exists(select * from @@table where ma_bt = $ma_bt.OldValue) begin select 'ma_bt' as field, replace(@$recordHasBeenChanged, '%s', rtrim(@ma_bt)) as message return end if @ma_bt <> $ma_bt.OldValue begin if exists(select * from @@table where ((ma_bt like rtrim(@ma_bt) + '%') or rtrim(@ma_bt) like rtrim(ma_bt) + '%') and ma_bt <> $ma_bt.OldValue) begin select 'ma_bt' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_bt)) as message return end if exists(select * from ctpbky where ma_bt = $ma_bt.OldValue) begin select 'ma_bt' as field, replace(@$updateConflict, '%s', rtrim($ma_bt.OldValue)) as message return end end if exists(select 1 from @@table where ma_bt = @ma_bt and (ngay_bd <> @ngay_bd or ngay_kt <> @ngay_kt)) begin if exists(select 1 from dmpbky1 where ma_bt = @ma_bt and nam * 12 + ky <> year(@ngay_bd) * 12 + month(@ngay_bd) and stt_rec <> '') begin select 'ngay_bd' as field, replace(@$updateConflict, '%s', rtrim($ma_bt.OldValue)) as message return end if exists(select 1 from dmpbky1 where ma_bt = @ma_bt and nam * 12 + ky <> year(@ngay_kt) * 12 + month(@ngay_kt) and stt_rec <> '') begin select 'ngay_kt' as field, replace(@$updateConflict, '%s', rtrim($ma_bt.OldValue)) as message return end end

delete dmpbky1 from dmpbky1 a join dmpbky b on a.ma_bt = b.ma_bt where (a.ma_bt = @ma_bt and a.nam * 12 + a.ky < year(b.ngay_bd) * 12 + month(b.ngay_bd) or (a.nam * 12 + a.ky > year(b.ngay_kt) *12 + month(b.ngay_kt))) and a.stt_rec = '' update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where ma_bt = @ma_bt

if @@admin <> 1 begin if not exists(select 1 from sysunitrights a where a.user_id = @@userID and a.r_del = 1 and exists(select 1 from @@table b where b.ma_dvcs = a.ma_dvcs and b.ma_bt = @ma_bt)) begin select '$NotAuthorized' as message return end end if exists(select * from ctpbky where ma_bt = @ma_bt) begin select 'ma_bt' as field, replace(@$deleteConflict, '%s', rtrim(@ma_bt)) as message return end

action.text: if exists(select 1 from dmtk where tk = @tk) begin select tk_cn from dmtk where tk = @tk return end
